_comment: Cloudflare Logpush → Axiom job for `pages_function_invocation_logs`. Created on the Pages project (not the zone). Provides per-handler outcome data; pairs with `http_requests` to correlate 5xx at the edge with the handler that produced them.
name: groupsmix-pages-functions-axiom

retention_policy.note: Function-invocation logs contain request-scoped context (Logs, Exceptions) that can include path parameters. Retain 14 days hot in Axiom; do NOT roll up to monthly — the value is per-request triage, not aggregates.
